info.name: back API - Manual + Recipe
info.description: Focused Postman collection for manual and recipe flows. Use a verified account, run Login first, then run the Setup folder from top to bottom once to create deterministic custom products for the rest of the checks.

item.name: POST /api/v1/manual/custom - seed exact product (resets seed vars)

exec: pm.test('product name matches', () => json.product && json.product.name === expected);
pm.test('normalized name matches', () => json.product && json.product.name === expected);
pm.test('suggestions include seeded names', () => Array.isArray(json.suggestions) && json.suggestions.includes(one) && json.suggestions.includes(two));
pm.test('message Product not found', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Product not found');
pm.test('message invalid json body', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'invalid json body');
pm.test('message invalid json body', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'invalid json body');
pm.test('message Invalid amount', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Invalid amount');
pm.test('message Invalid name', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Invalid name');
pm.test('product name matches', () => json.product && json.product.name === expected);
pm.test('message Invalid nutrients', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Invalid nutrients');
pm.test('message Product not found', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Product not found');
pm.test('resolved ingredient name', () => Array.isArray(json.ingredients) && json.ingredients[0].name === tomato);
pm.test('ingredient names match', () => json.ingredients[0].name === chicken && json.ingredients[1].name === rice);

item.name: POST /api/v1/recipe/analyze - duplicate ingredients normalized and merged -> 200

exec: pm.test('ingredient name matches custom product', () => Array.isArray(json.ingredients) && json.ingredients[0].name === custom);
pm.test('message invalid json body', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'invalid json body');
pm.test('message Recipe is empty', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Recipe is empty');
pm.test('message Invalid name', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Invalid name');

item.name: POST /api/v1/recipe/analyze - mixed valid and invalid ingredient -> 404

exec: pm.test('message Ingredient not found', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Ingredient not found');

item.name: POST /api/v1/recipe/analyze - ingredient not found without suggestions -> 404

exec: pm.test('message Ingredient not found', () => json.error && json.error.message === 'Ingredient not found');
